langchain-config.label: LangChain config
langchain-config.description: Provider, model, and API key for the chat model

langchain-chat-model.label: Chat model
langchain-chat-model.description: Expose a chat model to the agent (wires to model input)

langchain-tool-function.label: Function tool
langchain-tool-function.description: A custom tool defined by an async function body
langchain-tool-function.name: Tool name

langchain-vectorstore.label: Vector store (RAG tool)
langchain-vectorstore.description: Add documents / expose a retrieval tool

langchain-mcp-client.label: MCP client tool
langchain-mcp-client.description: Connect to an MCP server and expose its tools to the agent

langchain-agent.label: LangChain agent
langchain-agent.description: ReAct agent - runs in-band on msg input. Use the API variant for long runs.

langchain-agent-api.label: LangChain agent (API)
langchain-agent-api.description: Async HTTP agent endpoint. POST {input, sessionId} to its route.
